name: ClearShield 6mm Tempered Safety Glass
description: Premium 6mm fully tempered safety glass designed for office partitions, shower enclosures, and commercial facades. Offers 5x the strength of standard float glass. UV-blocking coating protects interiors from sun damage. Ideal for high-traffic areas requiring both safety and aesthetics.

name: AquaGuard 8mm Tempered Balcony Glass
description: Heavy-duty 8mm tempered glass engineered for balcony railings, staircases, and outdoor barriers. Features hydrophobic coating for rain resistance and easy maintenance. Wind load certified for high-rise applications. Provides panoramic views without compromising safety.

name: SoundGuard 10.38mm Acoustic Laminated Glass
description: Acoustic laminated glass with 0.38mm PVB interlayer providing superior sound insulation up to 42dB STC rating. Perfect for hotels, recording studios, hospitals, and roadside buildings. Low-E coating adds thermal efficiency without reducing sound attenuation.

name: EnergyPro 24mm IGU Double Glazed Unit
description: High-performance 24mm insulated glass unit (4mm + 16mm argon-filled cavity + 4mm) with Low-E coating. Achieves U-value of 1.1 W/m²K, reducing HVAC costs by up to 35%. Ideal for green buildings, hospitals, cold regions, and energy-efficient construction.

name: FloatClear 4mm Clear Float Glass
description: Standard optical-quality 4mm clear float glass with high light transmission (90%). Used for interior windows, picture frames, furniture glass tops, and display cases. Cost-effective solution for applications not requiring safety glass standards.

name: SolarShield 6mm Tinted Float Glass (Bronze)
description: 6mm bronze-tinted float glass with solar control properties. Reduces solar heat gain by 45% and glare by 60%. Widely used in commercial building facades, office windows, and automotive showrooms. Aesthetic bronze tint adds privacy without blocking natural light.

name: SafeWalk 17.52mm Structural Laminated Glass
description: Structural walking glass comprising 3×5mm glass + 2×0.76mm PVB interlayers. Anti-slip ceramic frit on top surface ensures safety compliance. Used in glass floors, mezzanines, walkways, and sky bridges. Supports loads of up to 3kN/m².

name: MirrorEdge 6mm Silvered Mirror Glass
description: Premium 6mm silvered mirror glass with copper backing and epoxy edge sealing to prevent black edge corrosion. Ideal for bathrooms, dressing rooms, gyms, salons, and decorative walls. Double-coated for superior reflection quality (reflectivity > 85%).

name: FrostArt 6mm Acid-Etched Frosted Glass
description: 6mm acid-etched frosted glass with uniform satin finish providing 70% light transmission with full privacy. Used in office partitions, conference rooms, bathroom windows, and decorative applications. The smooth frosted surface is easy to clean and fingerprint-resistant.

name: TempSafe 12mm Heat Soaked Tempered Glass
description: 12mm heat soaked tempered glass (HST) significantly reducing risk of spontaneous breakage due to NiS inclusions. Mandatory specification for overhead glazing, canopies, and structural point-fixed facades. Available with custom CNC drilling for spider fittings.

name: VisionPlus 32mm Triple Glazed IGU
description: Premium 32mm triple-glazed IGU (4mm + 12mm argon + 4mm + 12mm krypton + 4mm glass) with dual Low-E coatings achieving U-value 0.6 W/m²K. Passive House certified for extreme climate applications. Near-zero heat loss, condensation-free inner surface.

name: SecureMax 6.38mm Security Laminated Glass
description: Security-grade 6.38mm laminated glass (3mm + 0.38mm PVB + 3mm) tested to EN 356 P2A attack resistance. PVB interlayer holds fragments together on impact preventing injury. Used in jewelry stores, ATMs, bank counters, and residential entry doors.

name: SpandrelColor 6mm Ceramic Frit Spandrel Glass
description: Tempered spandrel glass with permanent ceramic frit coating for curtain wall systems. Conceals structural elements and insulation between floors while maintaining a seamless building exterior. Available in 200+ RAL colors. Fire and UV resistant coating.

name: BioShield 4mm Anti-Bacterial Glass
description: 4mm float glass with permanent silver-ion antimicrobial coating that eliminates 99.9% of bacteria on surface. Certified for hospitals, food processing facilities, laboratories, and clean rooms. Reduces bacterial growth continuously without any toxic chemicals.

name: FireStop 30-min Fire Rated Laminated Glass
description: 30-minute fire-rated laminated glass with intumescent gel interlayer that forms an opaque shield when exposed to fire. Maintains structural integrity and blocks heat radiation for 30 minutes (EW30). Required for fire doors, stairwells, lift lobbies, and rated corridors.
